name: Fareed Khan
commentDescription: Best service I have ever seen in my life. I have been to many hospitals but this is the best. I highly recommend this hospital to anyone in need of medical care.

name: Ayesha Malik
commentDescription: The doctors and nurses were extremely professional and caring. The emergency department handled my case quickly and efficiently. Truly grateful for the quality of care provided.

name: Usman Ali
commentDescription: The hospital environment was very clean and well managed. From registration to consultation, everything was smooth. A reliable healthcare facility in Islamabad.

name: Irum Akrum
commentTitle: Had a very good experience with their staff
commentDescription: Had a very good experience with their staff specially Miss Sebal is a dedicated and professional staff member. She administers injections every three days with great care and precision.

name: amna usmani
commentDescription: had a wonderful antenatal as well as postnatal experience with Dr ayeza(gynaecologist) at the hospital.  They are doing great👍

name: Ansa Mughal
commentDescription: My delivery took place at alfallah gernal hospital, It is very good and clean hospital the staff and doctors are very cooperative staff Sadia is very nice and cooperative doctor I had a very good experience there
